channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Former FBI agent: Transparency could stop conspiracy theorists
item.description: Gallagher said that while misinformation is "always a danger" in national events like these, "the FBI deals in evidence. Conspiracy theorists don't.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Republican Mike Johnson reelected House speaker in dramatic floor vote
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Republican Mike Johnson narrowly won reelection Friday as House speaker on a first ballot, overcoming hard-right GOP holdouts in a tense standoff and buoyed by a nod of support from President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, FARNOUSH AMIRI and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mike Johnson re-elected speaker: Here were the top three moments of the dramatic vote
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., narrowly held onto the gavel in a nail-biter vote on Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump slams Merchan, Democrats, who 'just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh' amid failed cases
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: President-elect Donald Trump slammed Judge Juan Merchan for denying his request to dismiss the charges against him in New York v. Trump, telling Fox News Digital Democrats “just want to see if they can get a pound of flesh because every case has failed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biden blocks $14 billion acquisition of US Steel by Japan's Nippon Steel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden has blocked the nearly $15 billion proposed deal for Nippon Steel of Japan to purchase Pittsburgh-based U.S. Steel — affirming his earlier vow on the presidential campaign trail to prevent the acquisition of Steeltown USA’s most storied steel company.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, JOSH BOAK and MARC LEVY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: GOP lawmaker, 81, receives medical attention after fall at US Capitol
item.description: Rep. Virginia Foxx of North Carolina, the Republican House Education Committee chair, fell on on a staircase at the U.S. Capitol Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Washington state Democrats accidentally email their 'radical' tax plan to entire Senate
item.description: Washington state Democrats appeared to have accidentally emailed their internal tax proposals and talking points to the full Evergreen State Senate, leading to outcry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal courts will not make criminal referrals to DOJ over separate ethics complaints against Justice Thomas
item.description: The U.S. Judicial Conference decided to not make criminals referrals to the Justice Department over separate ethics complaints against Justice Thomas violating ethics protocols.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chip Roy bid for Rules chair emerges as key issue ahead of Speaker vote
item.description: Rep. Chip Roy’s (R-Texas) bid to be chair of the House Rules Committee is emerging as a key issue for those withholding support for Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) ahead of Friday afternoon’s Speaker election. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.), who has withheld support for Johnson, told former Rep.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Here’s what Congress’s first day will look like
item.description: The 119th Congress kicks off Friday as lawmakers return to Washington with a long January to-do list and a packed first day. Confirmation hearings for President-elect Trump’s Cabinet nominees are set to get rolling in the coming weeks, and Trump himself will be inaugurated in less than three weeks.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Whip list: Lawmakers to watch in Friday’s Speaker vote
item.description: About a dozen lawmakers remain major question marks in Speaker Mike Johnson's (R-La.) quest to win a floor vote for the gavel Friday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: 119th Congress Latest: Mike Johnson narrowly reelected House speaker
item.description: The 119th Congress is convening for the first time and House Speaker Mike Johnson has narrowly been reelected to his post.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: AP Decision Notes: What to expect in Virginia's state legislative special elections
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Voters in Virginia will begin the new year filling state Senate and House vacancies on Tuesday in a trio of special elections that could determine control of the narrowly divided chambers. In the Washington suburbs of Loudoun County, Democratic state Sen.
item.dc:creator: ROBERT YOON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene to vote for Johnson after seeking to oust him from speakership last year
item.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who sought to oust House Speaker Mike Johnson from the speakership last year, plans to vote for him to remain in the role.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FBI checks, ethics paperwork threaten to slow down Trump confirmations
item.description: Republican sources on Capitol Hill warn that President-elect Trump’s nominees may be delayed because of paperwork holdups and the slow start of FBI background checks, creating obstacles for the speedy confirmation of Trump’s national security team.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to hold DC rally day before inauguration
item.description: The president-elect has not held a rally in the District of Columbia since he delivered a speech on the Ellipse on Jan. 6, 2021, which preceded a violent attack on the Capitol by supporters attempting to stop the certification of the 2020 election results.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Jill Biden gets the priciest gift from a foreign leader in 2023
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden and his family were given tens of thousands of dollars in gifts from foreign leaders in 2023, according to an annual accounting published by the State Department on Thursday, with first lady Jill Biden receiving the single most expensive present: a $20,000 diamo
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to rally in DC ahead of inauguration
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump is expected to hold a big Washington rally the day before he's sworn in as the nation's 47th president. The victory rally, as it's being billed, will be held at the Capitol One Arena in the District of Columbia on Jan. 19.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New laws in NJ impact minimum wage, data privacy, and reading content
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) -- With every new year come new laws -- each impacting someone somewhere in the Garden State. New Jersey's minimum wage is increasing to $15.49 an hour for most workers.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Trump calls it the 'center of the universe.' Mar-a-Lago is a magnet for those seeking influence
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The cars begin lining up early in the morning to be screened by Secret Service agents under white tents near the fence that surrounds President-elect Donald Trump’s vast south Florida estate.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: California regulation requires insurance companies to offer coverage in high-risk areas
item.description: California insurers will be required to sell coverage in wildfire-prone regions that have seen an insurer exodus in recent years, state Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, NewsNation

item.title: Trump gives complete and total endorsement of Johnson as Speaker
item.description: President-elect Trump offered his complete and total endorsement of Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Monday, days before a House vote on Friday to elect a new Speaker. "Speaker Mike Johnson is a good, hard working, religious man. He will do the right thing, and we will continue to WIN.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Musk calls some MAGA supporters ‘contemptible fools’ as visa row intensifies
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk labeled a section of President-elect Trump supporters as “contemptible fools” as the online debate around visas for highly skilled workers on the right intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC
